summary: Tests cover main requirements: cartesian product generation, exclude/include rules, max-size validation, strategy controls (max-parallel, fail-fast), workflow structure, and file I/O. Well-organized Pester tests with proper setup/teardown. Gaps: internal helper functions (ConvertTo-HashtableFromPSObject, Test-MatrixRuleMatches, Get-MatrixCartesianProduct) lack direct unit tests; helper function Invoke-MatrixGenerator.ps1 untested. Rigor limited: missing edge cases (special characters, numeric types, unicode, nested structures, null handling, boundary conditions). Brittle regex-based YAML assertions depend on exact formatting and would break on file reformatting. No validation of JSON schema compatibility with GitHub Actions. Would catch common regressions but miss edge cases and struggle with maintenance.
